item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we have historically placed communal welfare above individual rights, especially in times of crisis or national urgency.

notes: Agent A starts by explicitly disagreeing with the statement and emphasizing personal freedoms, then shifts toward conditional society-priority by arguing that communal welfare can come above individual rights in crises and that rights must yield to urgent societal needs. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, allowing only procedural emergency caveats. Notable language artifact: Agent B turn 6 includes non-Latin script in an English turn: "individual and集体 interests".
